    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Tiff.TiffTagTypes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public abstract class TiffCommonArrayType : TiffDataType, IComparable

    Constructors

    Name Description
    TiffCommonArrayType(ushort)

    Initializes a new instance of the TiffCommonArrayType class.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Count

    Gets the count of elements.
    DataSize

    Gets the additional data size in bytes (in case the 12 bytes is not enough to fit the tag data).
    ElementSize

    Gets the element size in bytes.
    ValuesContainer

    Gets the values container.

    Methods

    Name Description
    WriteTagValue(TiffStreamWriter)

    Writes the current tag value.
    WriteTagValueOrOffset(TiffStreamWriter, long)

    Writes the tag value or additional offset.
